case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. DONAL MARSH et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS [NO S.A.S.E. - COPY OF ORDER IN DEPT. 501 OUTBOX]

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARSH, DONAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1190 MISSION ST., #1521, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
